title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Kalyan Jewellers

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Kalyan Jewellers
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Kalyan Jewellers! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Allahabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Kalyan Jewellers:
Kalyan Jewellers is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kalyan Jewellers!
